'''yathuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabbatical|sabbatical]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-th-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabbatical|sabbatical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yathuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæthichith|yæthichith]] || [[word:yæthichij|yæthichij]] || [[word:yæthichish|yæthichish]] || [[word:yæthichi|yæthichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yathuthuchuth|yathuthuchuth]] || [[word:yathuthuchuj|yathuthuchuj]] || [[word:yathuthuchush|yathuthuchush]] || [[word:yathuthuchu|yathuthuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yathuchuth|yathuchuth]] || [[word:yathuchuj|yathuchuj]] || [[word:yathuchush|yathuchush]] || [[word:yathuchu|yathuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yathufchuth|yathufchuth]] || [[word:yathufchuj|yathufchuj]] || [[word:yathufchush|yathufchush]] || [[word:yathufchuf|yathufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yathuchuthu|yathuchuthu]] || [[word:yathuchuju|yathuchuju]] || [[word:yathuchushu|yathuchushu]] || [[word:yathuchuku|yathuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yathuchuth|yathuchuth]] || [[word:yathuchuj|yathuchuj]] || [[word:yathuchush|yathuchush]] || [[word:yathuchu|yathuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yathuchuthul|yathuchuthul]] || [[word:yathuchujul|yathuchujul]] || [[word:yathuchushul|yathuchushul]] || [[word:yathuchukul|yathuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yathuchuthuthu|yathuchuthuthu]] || [[word:yathuchujuju|yathuchujuju]] || [[word:yathuchushushu|yathuchushushu]] || [[word:yathuchuku|yathuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yathuchuthun|yathuchuthun]] || [[word:yathuchujun|yathuchujun]] || [[word:yathuchushun|yathuchushun]] || [[word:yathuchukun|yathuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yathuchuthuoro|yathuchuthuoro]] || [[word:yathuchujuoro|yathuchujuoro]] || [[word:yathuchushuoro|yathuchushuoro]] || [[word:yathuchukuoro|yathuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
